DEL_YN IN ('Y','N')
DEL_YN IN ('Y','N')
RSP_CNT >= 0 AND NEW_CNT >= 0 AND CHG_CNT >= 0 AND DUP_CNT >= 0 AND ERR_CNT >= 0
COLLECT_END_DTM IS NULL OR COLLECT_END_DTM >= COLLECT_START_DTM

description: 조회 시작과 종료 일시 순서 검사

DEL_YN IN ('Y','N')

DEL_YN IN ('Y','N')

DEL_YN IN ('Y','N')
ORD_RCV_YN IN ('Y','N')
